commands.php_syntax_check: find includes public admin -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l
commands.protected_surface_search: grep -RIn -e 'class SVDP_Voucher' -e 'class SVDP_Database' -e 'class SVDP_Manager' includes public admin
commands.forbidden_delivery_scope_search: grep -RIn -e 'delivery attempt' -e 'dispatch' -e 'driver' -e 'RouteShyft' includes public admin docs || true

notes.package_tooling: This WordPress plugin repo does not currently use package.json, npm, or pnpm. Node-based governance validators are installed from the governance pack but are not required in Slice G0 validation.
